thought.text:
I see - the Pinecone step data has metadata but not the actual step content (code, output, etc.). This is a streaming issue as you mentioned - the full trajectory content isn't stored in Pinecone.

This confirms your intuition: **running fresh tasks with @weave decorators is the better path** because we'll capture the full streaming content.

Let me pivot to create a fresh task runner that captures complete trajectories with Weave:

task_list.title: Set up environment with Weave + Pinecone
Explore existing Pinecone data for behavioral patterns
task_list.notes: Pinecone has step metadata but not full content - confirms need for fresh runs

task_list.title: Build Weave-instrumented evaluation pipeline
task_list.notes: TrajectoryEvaluator created but needs richer data

task_list.title: Run fresh task evaluations with @weave decorators
task_list.notes: Creating task runner with full trajectory capture

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Set up environment with Weave + Pinecone", "status": "done"}, {"title": "Explore existing Pinecone data for behavioral patterns", "status": "done", "notes": "Pinecone has step metadata but not full content - confirms need for fresh runs"}, {"title": "Design behavioral rubric evaluators (0-10 scale)", "status": "done", "notes": "Created BehavioralRubric, RubricScore, LLMJudge classes"}, {"title": "Build Weave-instrumented evaluation pipeline", "status": "done", "notes": "TrajectoryEvaluator created but needs richer data"}, {"title": "Run fresh task evaluations with @weave decorators", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Creating task runner with full trajectory capture"}, {"title": "Create visualizations for fellowship application", "status": "todo"}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Update task progress - pivoting to fresh task runs"}

summary: Update task progress - pivoting to fresh task runs
